title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Palo Alto Networks is the global leader in cybersecurity, protecting 67M+ users daily. We're the trusted platform for enterprises securing their digital way of life. As a BI Analyst, you'll translate security data into intelligence driving product strategy.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain business intelligence dashboards
Analyze data to support security strategy
Create reports on threat landscapes and security metrics
Support data modeling and warehouse development

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Business, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of business intelligence or data analysis experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
